sourceFramework: AEM Cloud Service with EMU (Experience Manager Unified) components

localBlocks.name: hero
localBlocks.purpose: Full-width hero banner with background image/video, heading, subtext, and optional CTA

localBlocks.name: cards
localBlocks.purpose: Grid of content items with images, headings, and descriptions

localBlocks.name: carousel
localBlocks.purpose: Rotating slideshow of content with navigation controls and indicators

localBlocks.name: accordion
localBlocks.purpose: Expandable question-and-answer or collapsible content sections

localBlocks.name: tabs
localBlocks.purpose: Tabbed interface for organizing related content into switchable panels

localBlocks.name: columns
localBlocks.purpose: Side-by-side content layout in 2 or 3 columns

localBlocks.name: before-after
localBlocks.purpose: Before/after image comparison slider for treatment results

localBlocks.name: clinic-finder
localBlocks.purpose: Interactive clinic search with Google Maps Places autocomplete and geolocation

localBlocks.name: topic-menu
localBlocks.purpose: Sticky horizontal anchor navigation for in-page topic sections (FAQ page)

localBlocks.name: header
localBlocks.purpose: Global site header with logo, navigation menu, and CTA button

localBlocks.name: footer
localBlocks.purpose: Global site footer with links, legal notices, logos, and mobile accordion layout

localBlocks.name: fragment
localBlocks.purpose: Reusable content section that can be embedded across pages

localBlocks.name: metadata
localBlocks.purpose: Page metadata block for document-level properties

blockCollectionMatches.name: hero
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local hero block already implements image + video variants based on Block Collection pattern

blockCollectionMatches.name: cards
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local cards block based on Block Collection. Used for treatment area grid items

blockCollectionMatches.name: carousel
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local carousel based on Block Collection. Used for product showcases and BA comparisons

blockCollectionMatches.name: accordion
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local accordion based on Block Collection. Used for FAQ sections on treatment + QA pages

blockCollectionMatches.name: tabs
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local tabs block based on Block Collection. Used for treatment areas section and clinic map/list toggle

blockCollectionMatches.name: columns
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Local columns block based on Block Collection. Used for media-text (image+text) layouts

blockCollectionMatches.name: embed
blockCollectionMatches.notes: Needed for Vimeo video embeds on lips and eye-area treatment pages. Auto-blocked from URLs.

patterns.name: hero
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-teaser with hero-teaser class, full-bleed background image with overlay text, heading, and CTA button. Homepage variant includes autoplay background video.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Background image with desktop/mobile variants, heading, text, CTA

variants.name: video
variants.description: Autoplay background MP4 video with overlay content (homepage only)

rows.description: Content: heading, paragraph text, CTA link

patterns.name: cards
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-card components with background images and overlaid title/body/footer. Used in treatment areas section to show treatment options (lips, eyes, enhance, restore, male).

variants.name: default
variants.description: Card with image, title, body text, and link in footer

patterns.name: before-after
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-comparison-slider with two image slots (before and after). Interactive drag slider to compare treatment results. Wrapped in juvederm-ba-image-comparator container with heading text.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Single comparison pair with draggable slider

variants.name: carousel
variants.description: Multiple comparison pairs in carousel (homepage ba-carousel)

patterns.notes: No Block Collection or Block Party equivalent. Custom JS required for drag interaction.

patterns.name: carousel
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-carousel used for product showcases on treatment pages. Shows multiple product items with images and descriptions. Also used for key takeaways bullet points on QA page.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Standard carousel with prev/next arrows and indicators

variants.name: multi-visible
variants.description: Shows 3-4 items visible at once (products showcase)

variants.name: no-controls
variants.description: Static multi-item display for key takeaways (QA page)

columns: Slide content (image + text or just content)

patterns.name: accordion
patterns.sourcePattern: aaaem-accordion (badger-accordion) for FAQ sections on treatment pages (juvederm-faqshort) and full QA page (juvederm-qacontainer). Expandable question/answer pairs.

variants.name: footer
variants.description: Mobile footer accordion (shared chrome, not a content block)

patterns.name: tabs
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-tabs (aaaem-tabs) used in treatment areas section. Tab labels are treatment area names, tab panels contain treatment cards. Also used on clinics page for map/list toggle.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Horizontal tabs with switchable content panels

contentModel.rows: First child of each row = tab label, rest = tab panel content

patterns.name: columns
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-mediatext container: side-by-side layout with image on one side and text content on the other. Variants: LTR (image left) and RTL (image right). Some have no title.

variants.name: reversed
variants.description: Text left, image right (RTL) — achievable via row order

patterns.notes: Maps naturally to columns block. RTL/LTR direction handled by column order in authoring.

patterns.name: clinic-finder
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-location-services with Google Maps Places autocomplete. Appears as compact CTA on homepage/treatment pages (c-find-the-clinic-video section) and as full-page search on find-a-clinic. Uses Google Maps API for geocoding and clinic results.

variants.name: compact
variants.description: Inline search with heading, input, and submit button (treatment pages)

variants.name: full-page
variants.description: Full clinic search with map, list view, and detailed results (find-a-clinic, clinics pages)

rows.description: URL for full clinic results page

patterns.notes: Requires Google Maps Places API. Configuration-style block with key-value rows. The full-page variant needs ICL (Integrated Clinic Locator) feed integration.

patterns.name: image-map
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-image-map with interactive markers on a face/body image. Markers highlight treatment areas (lips, eyes, etc.) and link to treatment pages. Uses absolute-positioned markers.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Face image with clickable treatment area markers

rows.description: Row 2+: Marker label | X% | Y% | Link URL

patterns.notes: NOT in local blocks yet — needs to be built. Interactive hotspot image with positioned markers. Each marker has coordinates (percentage-based) and links to a treatment page.

patterns.name: embed
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-embed (aaaem-embed) wrapping Vimeo video player iframes. Found on lips and eye-area treatment pages only.

contentModel.description: Vimeo URLs auto-blocked by embed block. Author pastes a Vimeo link.

patterns.notes: Block Collection embed block handles Vimeo auto-detection. Not yet in local blocks — needs to be added from Block Collection.

patterns.name: topic-menu
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-topicmenu: sticky horizontal anchor navigation linking to in-page sections. Used on the QA (FAQ) page to jump between topic categories.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Horizontal sticky nav with anchor links, highlights active section on scroll

contentModel.rows: Single row with a list of anchor links
contentModel.description: Unordered list of links pointing to section IDs on the page

patterns.name: default-content
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-brandstatements: centered text section with a large heading and descriptive paragraph about the Juvéderm brand. No interactive behavior.
patterns.notes: Pure heading + paragraph — no block needed. Style with section-level CSS class.

patterns.name: columns
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-3up: three-column grid layout with image + text in each column. Used on treatment pages for product information or related content.
patterns.notes: Three-column content fits naturally into columns block with 3 cols.

patterns.name: default-content
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-footnotes: small text legal disclaimers and reference notes at bottom of content sections.
patterns.notes: Small-text paragraphs — default content with a section style class for smaller font.

patterns.name: columns
patterns.sourcePattern: juvederm-keytakeaways: horizontally arranged highlight items (3 side-by-side bullet points with icons). On QA page uses emu-carousel in static multi-visible mode.
patterns.notes: Three highlight items side by side. Better modeled as columns block (3-col) rather than carousel, since all items should be visible.

patterns.name: default-content
patterns.sourcePattern: emu-button with various styles: primary-filled (dark), primary-outline (bordered), secondary-filled. CTA patterns include 'Vind een kliniek' (find a clinic), 'Lees meer' (read more), 'Afspraak maken' (make appointment).
patterns.notes: Links styled as buttons via CSS. Author creates a bold link or strong link for primary CTA, regular link for secondary. Button styles defined in site-level CSS.

patterns.name: default-content
patterns.sourcePattern: Plain text content for legal/disclaimer pages. Simple heading and paragraph structure with no interactive components.
patterns.notes: Pure text content — headings, paragraphs, links. No blocks needed.

typography.note: Custom web fonts loaded via Adobe Typekit and Google Fonts
